summary: All bug fixes verified: (1) BrandContext auto-fetches brands after login - brands now show in header and Settings > Marcas, (2) Password change in Settings > Segurança now calls real backend POST /api/auth/change-password instead of fake setTimeout, (3) Admin badge shows 'Admin' instead of 'Cliente' for admin users. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All flows verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token, user data, and is_admin field
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user info with is_admin field
Backend: GET /api/brands returns brands list for authenticated user
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password with wrong current password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password with short password returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password with valid data changes password successfully
Backend: Login with new password works after password change
Backend: Brands still accessible after password change
Frontend: Login with admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026! redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Brand name 'Marca Demo' appears in header after login
Frontend: Settings > Marcas tab shows brand list (Marca Demo, Sandro Serzedello)
Frontend: Settings > Segurança password change calls POST /api/auth/change-password
Frontend: Password change shows success toast 'Senha alterada com sucesso!'
Frontend: User menu shows 'Admin' badge for admin user (not 'Cliente')
critical_code_review_comments: BrandContext.js: Auto-fetch useEffect correctly triggers when user+token available, uses hasFetchedRef to prevent duplicate fetches
BrandContext.js: Uses localStorage fallback for token (line 27, 55) which ensures brands load even if context token is delayed
Settings.js: handleSaveSecurity (lines 346-376) now properly calls axios.post to /api/auth/change-password with current_password and new_password
Layout.js: Badge condition (line 453-454) correctly checks user?.role === 'admin' || user?.is_admin to show 'Admin' badge
auth.py: POST /auth/change-password (lines 271-300) validates current password, checks min length, and updates password hash
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and brands

fix_1_brands_not_showing.issue: Brands not showing after login because BrandContext didn't auto-fetch
fix_1_brands_not_showing.fix: BrandContext now has useEffect that auto-fetches brands when user+token available
fix_1_brands_not_showing.verification: VERIFIED - Brand 'Marca Demo' appears in header and Settings > Marcas shows brand list

fix_2_fake_password_change.issue: Password change was fake (showed success but never called backend)
fix_2_fake_password_change.verification: VERIFIED - API call detected, password actually changes, login with new password works

fix_3_wrong_role_badge.issue: Role badge showed 'Cliente' for admin users
fix_3_wrong_role_badge.fix: Layout.js badge condition now checks user?.role === 'admin' || user?.is_admin
fix_3_wrong_role_badge.verification: VERIFIED - User menu shows 'Admin' badge for admin user

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three bug fixes verified working: (1) BrandContext auto-fetch, (2) real password change API call, (3) Admin badge display. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_password_change.py covers auth endpoints including password change. Admin credentials: admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026!
